Object# PriceChangeCannotBeIssuedWhenAlreadyCommunicatedError

Advanced Commerce API 1.2+

## [Properties](/documentation/AdvancedCommerceAPI/PriceChangeCannotBeIssuedWhenAlreadyCommunicatedError#properties)

`errorCode``number`

 Value: `4000205``errorMessage``string`

 Value: `Invalid request. A price change can't be issued when the price increase has already been communicated.`## [ Mentioned in ](/documentation/AdvancedCommerceAPI/PriceChangeCannotBeIssuedWhenAlreadyCommunicatedError#mentions)
